title: Airtel Africa’s Q1-26 Results: Stellar Performance Driven by Nigeria’s Tariff Hike and Subscriber Growth - FinancialEDGE
description: Airtel Africa Plc released its ffirst quarter unaudited financial results, showcasing a remarkable improvement in performance. The company's earnings per share (EPS) skyrocketed to USD3.40, a significant jump from USD0.18 in first quarter of 2025. This growth was primarily driven by a 33% year-on-year increase in operating income and a 33.9% decline in total finance
html: Airtel Africa Plc released its ffirst quarter unaudited financial results, showcasing a remarkable improvement in performance. The company’s earnings per share (EPS) skyrocketed to USD3.40, a significant jump from USD0.18 in first quarter of 2025.
